Document:
# Free Agents
Free Agents are ghost-controlled roles with no specific objectives or faction allegiances. They are simply creatures and wanderers of the station living out their own existence — whether that means hiding in vents, rattling down corridors, or honking at unsuspecting crew.
Unlike most antagonists, Free Agents are [bold]not required to cause harm[/bold], though their nature often leads to memorable interactions regardless.
## Types of Free Agents
- [textlink="Skeletons" link="FreeAgentSkeletons"] — undead humanoids that have crawled out of closets and other hiding spots. - [textlink="Mice" link="FreeAgentMice"] — tiny rodents that call the station's walls and vents home. - [textlink="Mothroach" link="FreeAgentMothroach"] — the adorable result of one too many genetics experiments. - [textlink="Snails" link="FreeAgentSnails"] — slow (or surprisingly fast) molluscs that have taken up residence aboard. - [textlink="Bots" link="FreeAgentBots"] — malfunctioning service robots that have developed a personality of their own. - [textlink="Visitors" link="FreeAgentVisitors"] — humanoid travelers who arrive on the station with their own agendas. - [textlink="Sentient Artifact" link="FreeAgentArtifact"] — xenoarchaeological artifacts that have awoken and gained the ability to move.
